status_row.notes: First-pass derivation from MinerU Markdown; PDF not opened; online appendix equations and coefficient definitions need targeted review.

unresolved_issues: Online appendix material is needed for the complete financial contract derivation, price-setting recursions, steady-state solution, and gap coefficient definitions.
Calvo auxiliary recursions present in the Rep-MMB implementation are not fully source-derived in this first-pass entry.
Implementation shocks to monitoring cost and idiosyncratic-risk dispersion require source classification before promotion.
